tailwindConfig.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700
tailwindConfig.input: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all
tailwindConfig.select: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all
tailwindConfig.textarea: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all
tailwindConfig.checkbox: h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500
tailwindConfig.submitButton: w-full px-6 py-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-600 text-white font-medium hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all

next.class: px-6 py-3 rounded-xl bg-[#0a91b1] text-white font-medium hover:bg-[#0a91b1]/90 transition-all duration-300

back.class: px-6 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 font-medium hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all duration-300

confirm.class: px-6 py-3 rounded-xl bg-green-600 text-white font-medium hover:bg-green-700 transition-all duration-300

active.circle: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1] flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300

inactive.circle: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300
